description: Set up minimal test infrastructure for smoke tests
steps: Install Bun test dependencies if needed
Add test script to package.json: 'bun test'
Can run: bun test (even if no tests yet)

description: Write HIGH-LEVEL smoke tests for bot startup/shutdown
steps: Test: import bot main file doesn't crash
All tests pass: bun test src/__tests__/smoke.test.ts
Keep tests simple - just verify it doesn't explode

description: Write HIGH-LEVEL smoke test for message handling
steps: Test: can receive mock Telegram message

description: Flatten monorepo structure from packages/coding to root
steps: Move all files from packages/coding/src to root src/
Root package.json has dev, start, typecheck, test scripts
Merge all .env* files from packages/coding to root
Move mcp-config.ts to root if needed
Update all imports to use relative paths (no workspace refs)
Update smoke tests to use new paths (src/ not packages/coding/src)
bun test passes (smoke tests still work!)
bun run typecheck passes with zero errors
Git commit: 'refactor: flatten monorepo to single package structure'

description: Write comprehensive unit tests for SessionManager
steps: Test session discovery from file system
All tests pass: bun test src/__tests__/session-manager.test.ts

description: Write unit tests for message routing and forwarding
steps: Test text message routing to active session
Test message queueing when no active session
Test error handling for failed message sends
All tests pass: bun test src/__tests__/message-router.test.ts

description: Write unit tests for Telegram bot commands
steps: All tests pass: bun test src/__tests__/commands.test.ts

description: Write unit tests for Claude response streaming
steps: Test streaming message updates to Telegram
Test stream error handling and recovery
All tests pass: bun test src/__tests__/streaming.test.ts

description: Update README with testing and development instructions
steps: Add 'Running Tests' section with test commands
Document test structure and mocking approach

description: Manual end-to-end verification of bot functionality
steps: Start bot: bun run dev (verify clean startup)
Send /start command via Telegram (verify welcome message)
Start a Claude Code session in another terminal
Send text message to bot (verify forwarding to Claude)
Verify response streams back to Telegram
Send voice message (verify transcription if OPENAI_API_KEY set)
Send photo to bot (verify image processing)
